backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the Hostel data types, sample data initialization, and CRUD operations for a hostel listing platform, including visitor tracking, blob storage mixin, and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (hostels without amenities) to the new state by injecting hardcoded amenity arrays per hostel ID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (amenity pills on HostelCard, AmenitiesSection on HostelDetail, amenities editing on EditHostel) to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest link, geo tags, and JSON-LD structured data for the Hostel Addas site.
frontend/public/googlee7577b039261c25d.h: Google Search Console site verification file.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest defining the app name, theme color, display mode, and icon for Hostel Addas.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the main, privacy, disclaimer, and SEO-guide pages with their last-modified dates and priorities.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with all application routes (home, hostel detail, add/edit hostel, and static pages) and exports the root App component with RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Renders placeholder ad banner slots in three sizes (leaderboard, rectangle, banner) with detailed inline instructions for swapping in real Google AdSense <ins> blocks.
Collapsible filter panel that lets users filter hostels by price range (min/max inputs) and sharing type (checkboxes), showing an active-filter count badge.
frontend/src/components/AmenitiesSection: Displays a hostel's amenities as a responsive icon-and-label grid, mapping known amenity strings to Lucide icons with a fallback star icon.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Renders a row of toggle buttons for filtering hostels by category (All, Girls, Boys, Co-Living) with highlighted active state.
frontend/src/components/HostelCard.tsx: Card component that displays a hostel's image, category badge, price range, amenities, contact info, and sponsored indicator, navigating to the detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/HostelGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive 3-column grid of HostelCard components with loading spinner and empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/components/HostelMap.tsx: Draws a canvas-style map of Hyderabad using a div-based approach, placing color-coded markers for each hostel based on normalized lat/lng coordinates with a category legend.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: A React image gallery component that displays a list of images with navigation arrows, keyboard support, a counter overlay, and clickable thumbnails.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links (Browse, Advertise, Earn, Download, Add Hostel), a visitor count display, and a footer with copyright info.
frontend/src/components/MapLocationPicke: A Google Maps-based location picker component that loads the Maps script dynamically, supports address autocomplete, map click, and marker drag to select and report a location.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A simple controlled search input component with a search icon and a clear button that appears when the input has a value.
frontend/src/components/SeoInfoBanner.ts: A dismissible informational banner that guides users to submit their site to Google Search Console, with a collapsible step-by-step indexing guide; dismissed state is persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/SortControls.tsx: A sort control component rendering a dropdown select with options for sorting hostels by price, name, or location.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useMutations.ts: Defines React Query mutation hooks for adding and updating hostels via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all hostels, hostels by category, a single hostel, visitor count, and earnings stats from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for a warm color palette including category-specific colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddHostel.tsx: Form page for adding a new hostel listing with fields for name, category, description, address, location picker, room sharing options, and image URLs.
frontend/src/pages/Advertise.tsx: Marketing page for advertising on Hostel Addas, displaying stats, contact options (WhatsApp/email), and advertising benefits.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Static disclaimer page outlining liability limitations, user-generated content policies, and third-party link disclaimers with JSON-LD breadcrumb markup.
frontend/src/pages/Download.tsx: Page guiding users to install the Hostel Addas Progressive Web App on Android and iOS devices with step-by-step instructions and feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/Earnings.tsx: A monetization dashboard page that displays live visitor stats, a CPM-based revenue calculator, and information about earning opportunities (display ads, sponsored listings, etc.) for site owners.
frontend/src/pages/EditHostel.tsx: A form page for editing an existing hostel's room capacity/pricing details and amenities, pre-populated from fetched hostel data and submitted via an update mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The main listing page that fetches all hostels, applies category, search, price, sharing-type, and sort filters, and renders a grid of hostel cards interspersed with ad banners alongside a map view.
frontend/src/pages/HostelDetail.tsx: A detail page for a single hostel that displays an image gallery, amenities, room/pricing options, map, contact info, and ad banners, with fallback category-specific placeholder images.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: A static Privacy Policy page covering data collection, usage, storage, user rights, and third-party services, with embedded JSON-LD breadcrumb structured data.
frontend/src/pages/SeoGuide.tsx: A React page that renders a step-by-step SEO guide for getting the Hostel Addas site indexed on Google, including structured JSON-LD breadcrumb data, styled section/tip/code-block components, and navigation breadcrumbs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (warm palette, category-specific colors using oklch), border radius, fonts, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 41) tracking the hostel listing website's architecture, existing features, and known issues such as Google indexing problems and broken category filtering on the homepage.
